content.en:
"It's finally been researched, and it's time to fuse the first sequence of Supreme Dao Rule items!"

Ye Tian once again took out those low-quality first-order Supreme Dao Rule items and placed them in the hole of the Eternal Rule Disk.

Immediately after, Ye Tian put the Eternal Rule Disk into his body to refine and urge.

Rumble!!!!!

The Eternal Rule Disc shone brightly, and the nine low-quality first-order Supreme Dao Rule items began to merge under the effect of the Eternal Rule Disk.

Time passes slowly.

At this time, the side effects of the first sequence of Dao Rule items were superimposed on Ye Tian's body, causing his copy body to gradually collapse.

This is not a side effect of the Eternal Rule Plate, but a side effect of a low-quality first-order Supreme Dao Rule item, if he gets a perfect-level first-order Supreme Dao Rule item, then there will be no side effects.

It's a pity that he couldn't find a Perfection-level first-order Supreme Dao Rule item.

Therefore, even if the function of the Eternal Rule Disk is excavated by others, it is incomparably weak, and Ye Tian can play its role.

After refining and fusing a body with a replica body, these nine first-order Supreme Dao rule items were finally fused into a first-order Supreme Dao rule item, but it was still of low quality, but the first-order Supreme Dao rule origin contained inside was more powerful, and it was more than ten times stronger.

"Continue to merge!"

Ye Tian decided.

After that, he fused all the low-quality first-order Supreme Dao Rule items he had obtained.

As the years passed, the low-quality first-order Solomon Rule item gradually became one.

And at this moment, Ye Tian felt that this low-quality first-order supreme rule item seemed to be about to transform, but it was still a little close.

"The first sequence of Supreme Dao rule items is still not enough, we have to go to the Eternal Dark Abyss to continue collecting the first sequence of Supreme Dao rule items!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Thereupon.

He continued to search for the first sequence of Supreme Dao Rule items in the depths of the Eternal Darkness Abyss, and once he found it, he found a way to get the real body to copy and send it out.

It doesn't always succeed, but most of the time.

Gradually, Ye Tian collected more first-order Dao rule items, and even found two more innate primordial treasures, but they were just ordinary innate primordial treasures that could increase combat power and increase cultivation speed.

After having these low-quality first-order supreme rule items, Ye Tian continued to fuse them.

Finally, the first sequence of Solomon Rule items after the fusion underwent a metamorphosis.

Rumble!!!!!

The transformation of the first sequence of Dao rule items released terrifying fluctuations, which also annihilated Ye Tian's replica body.

However, his other copy body still urged the formation to suppress it, stabilizing its aura and preventing it from emitting it.

After a while, this Supreme Rule item has successfully transformed into a complete object.

Then.

Ye Tian saw an irregular item appear in his perception, it was a Supreme Dao Rule item, but the origin of the Supreme Dao Rule contained within it had already surpassed the first sequence of Supreme Dao Rules.

"Let's use the Eye of Identification to identify it!"

Ye Tian urged the eye of identification, and it took a long time to identify it.

Eternal Sequence to Dao Rules item, low quality, name unknown, can assist in comprehending Eternal Sequence to Dao Rules, side effects are ......

Later, there was a series of side effects, after all, this was an eternal sequence supreme rule item that was fused with a variety of low-quality first-order supreme rule items, and its side effects were naturally many.

It can be said that this treasure was given to other patriarchs, and those patriarchs did not dare to refine it.

Ye Tian was very excited, this was an Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item that surpassed the first Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item, he was completely able to rely on this Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item to comprehend the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule.

"Above the rules of the first sequence of the Supreme Dao is the rules of the Eternal Sequence of the Supreme Dao, the first elder and the first demon lord have definitely comprehended the rules of the eternal sequence of the supreme path, otherwise the strength will not far surpass the other elder demon venerables. "

Ye Tian guessed.

But now, he was also able to comprehend the rules of the Eternal Sequence to the Dao.

"Next, let's comprehend the rules of the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao!"

Ye Tian swallowed this Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item into his body, began to refine it, and then comprehended the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule.

However, one of his replica bodies simply didn't last long before collapsing.

Therefore, he needs to copy his body many times, and come to enlightenment again and again, before he can hope to comprehend the rules of the eternal sequence to the Dao.

Soon.

The first replica body is scrapped!

Then the second, the third, the fourth......

The years passed.

Ye Tian didn't know how many times he had copied his body, and the resources had consumed a huge amount, but he still didn't care and continued to refine and comprehend.

The 10,000 Solstice Era has passed!

The 50,000 Solsmen Era has passed!

The 100,000 Solstice Era has passed.

It wasn't until the 1,820,000 Solstice Dao Era years that he truly comprehended a trace of the Eternal Sequence Dao Rules.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's body was filled with a trace of the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, just a wisp of the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, it contained incomparably terrifying power, and his body was tempered by the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and it was also undergoing slight changes.

The foundation and potential are all changing.

It is conceivable that it should be easier for him to cultivate the Supreme Divine Body in the future than before.

"My strength is much stronger now than in the past, even if I am the thirty-fifth elder, I should be able to defeat the other party in one move!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He estimated that his strength should have reached the level of the top ten elders, as long as the cultivation and the supreme divine body were improved, the future strength would definitely be able to match or even surpass the first elder.

"The matter of me comprehending the rules of the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao must not be exposed for the time being, otherwise the First Demon Venerable will definitely not let me grow up!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Thereupon.

In the years that followed, he focused on improving his cultivation and improving his supreme mythical body.

......

Agar Pulp Realm.

A copy of Ye Tian's body condensed the golden feather liquid here, but this time the speed at which he condensed it was extremely fast, because he used the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule.

Buzz Buzz!!

Drops of golden feather liquid condensed, and the efficiency was countless times that of the past.

"I didn't expect that after comprehending the rules of the Eternal Sequence to the Dao, there would be such benefits, and the human race would not lack the golden feather liquid in the future!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

He came to the deepest part of the elixir realm, where the energy was even stronger.

He was ready to condense the energy here to see if he could condense a resource that could improve the cultivation of the patriarch.
